# External Skill Intake Fixtures

Synthetic repositories used to exercise `scripts/external_skill_intake.py`.

These fixtures intentionally model install postures, not real public projects:

- `clean-cross-host-pack` has a small skill, plugin metadata, Cursor rule, Copilot instructions, AGENTS.md, and license.
- `risky-script-pack` has a skill plus remote shell install script and no license.

Do not replace these fixtures with cloned third-party repos. Real public repos belong in a sibling intake workspace such as `../skill-intake`.
